license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.sqdeds6
title: Intracellular Cytokine Staining
author: Kristin Anderson

steps_raw.instruction: Prepare a flat bottom 96 well plate. Resuspend cells at 10e6 cells/ml in T cell media. Transfer at least 350ul of cells per condition into a fresh tube (you want at least 3 replicate wells at 100ul/well for each condition).
Dilute Golgi Plug to 1:50 (2mg/ml) in cells for the experiment. (Once the treatment condition is added the final concentration will be 1:100 = 1mg/ml)
Plate 100ul of cells per well.

Dilute the PMA (prepare at 40ng/mL PMA so that the final concentration in the assay will be 20ng/mL) and Ionomycin (prepare at 2mg/mL Ionomycin so that the final concentration in the assay will be 1mg/mL) in one tube of media. Resuspend peptide at 2ug/100ul.
Add 100ul of media or PMA/I or peptide to each well. Incubate 4-6 hours in 37°C incubator.
Transfer cells to U-bottom 96 well plate. - at this step, you can combine the replicate wells if you were low on cells.
Centrifuge (Cfg) plate at 4 o C for 2 min @809 xg (with high brake) + dump supernatant.
Add 50ul Live/Dead stain per well (dilute 5ul of dye in 2.5ml 1x DPBS).
Incubate for 20-30 minutes in fridge at 4 o C (dark).
Add 100 ul of FACS Buffer per well to wash. Cfg plate at 4 o C for 2 min @809 xg (with high brake) + dump supernatant.
Prepare cocktail of antibodies for cell surface stain. Add 50-75uL of surface stain mix per well. Resuspend pellet by pipetting up + down at least 5x.
Incubate plates 30 min in fridge at 4 o C (dark).
Add 100 ul of FACS Buffer per well to wash. Cfg plate at 4 o C for 2 min @809 xg (with high brake) + dump supernatant.
Add 150 ul of FACS Buffer per well to wash a second time. Cfg plate at 4 o C for 2 min @809 xg (with high brake) + dump supernatant.
Add 150 ul of FACS Buffer per well to wash a third time. Cfg plate at 4 o C for 2 min @809 xg (with high brake) + dump supernatant.
Add 100 ul of Fixation/Permeabilization solution per well. Resuspend pellet by pipetting up + down at least 5x. Incubate plate 20 minutes at 4 o C in fridge (dark).
Add 100 ul of Perm/Wash Buffer (PWB) per well to wash. CHANGE BREAK to SETTING 2 for all remaining centrifugation steps.
Cfg plate at 4 o C for 2 min @809 xg (with brake = 2) + dump supernatant.
Add 150 ul of Perm/Wash Buffer per well to wash a second time. Cfg plate at 4 o C for 2 min @809 xg (with brake = 2) + dump supernatant.
Add 150 ul of Perm/Wash Buffer per well to wash a third time. Cfg plate at 4 o C for 2 min @809 xg (with brake = 2) + dump supernatant.
Prepare cocktail of antibodies in PWB buffer for Intracellular stain. Add 50-75uL of intracellular stain mix per well. Resuspend pellet by pipetting up + down at least 5x.
Incubate plate 30 minutes at 4 o C in fridge (dark).
Add 100 ul of Perm/Wash Buffer (PWB) per well to wash. Cfg plate at 4 o C for 2 min @809 xg (with brake = 2) + dump supernatant.
Add 150 ul of Perm/Wash Buffer per well to wash a second time. Cfg plate at 4 o C for 2 min @809 xg (with brake = 2) + dump supernatant.
Add 150 ul of Perm/Wash Buffer per well to wash a third time. Cfg plate at 4 o C for 2 min @809 xg (with brake = 2) + dump supernatant.
Resuspend in 200 ul of 0.5% PFA (can leave overnight at this step). Store in fridge at 4 o C until acquisition. Run samples on the flow cytometer within 24 hours for best results.
